title: The Clockwork Train
description: A journey north begins, racing against time.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: Vera, we should rest while we can. The journey will take all day.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Rest? How can you rest? We're on an adventure! Save the Professor, find out what the creepers want with his pocket watch, save the day!

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: what makes you think it's a pocket watch?

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Everything the professor does, involves a pocket watch. I have one right here... so do you, somewhere...

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: Every time I close my eyes, I see Da in danger.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: So do I. Tea. It never fails.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Addie produces her tea service. The familiar ritual of brewing begins.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: A gentleman in fine clothes stands across from you, reading. He glances over the pages.

opening.speaker: Gentleman
opening.text: Traveling alone, young miss? That's quite unusual. Do your parents know where you are?

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: I'm visiting my aunt up north. My... my companions keep me safe.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: His tone unsettles you. You say nothing. He returns to his newspaper.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You settle back into your seat and look out at the scenery.

teaPuzzle.title: Tea on the Train
teaPuzzle.instructions: Serve tea to your companions. The journey is long — a little comfort goes a long way.
